title: Everbuild Mammoth General Purpose Trade Quality Masking Tape – Suitable for Paint Masking – Off White – 75mm x 50m Roll
features: HIGH-QUALITY – This trade quality masking tape is ideal for masking off wall areas, moulding, sockets, switches, light fittings, extractors and more prior to painting.
EASY TO TEAR – This general-purpose tape is easy to tear for simple applications. Simply press firmly into place while unrolling and cut or tear when finished.
CLEAN REMOVAL – Contains a hot melt adhesive that can be left on for up to 3 days without leaving a residue, depending on conditions.
EASY TO APPLY – Always ensure the surface is clean, sound and dry prior to application.
MULTIPLE SIZES – Available in widths of 19mm, 25mm, 38mm, 50mm and 75mm.
description: From the manufacturer Everbuild – A Sika Company The UK and Ireland’s largest manufacturer of sealants, adhesives, DIY products, powders and building chemicals. Everbuild are proud to be home to the trade’s most respected products which have been enhanced over the years by class-leading research and facilities. With unique technology including i-Cure and Active Resin Technology, Everbuild’s product development activity is relentlessly setting industry standards at the highest quality and leading the field in solving the problems of the future, today.
